selected_title: On the main factors of knowledge absorptive capacity of enterprise
question: What operational artifact in “On the main factors of knowledge absorptive capacity of enterprise” could make the Absorptive capacity feedback loop auditable?

evidence_spans.text: This paper analyses the main factors of knowledge absorptive capacity of enterprise We find that, absorptive capacity is closely related to prior knowledge, RD, learning force, learning method, organization learning system We analysis the different strategy and it effect in undeveloped region The advice to improve absorptive capacity is discussed finally

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses Absorptive capacity, Knowledge management through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 51 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
